use_cases: Demonstrates three AnimatePresence animation modes (sync, wait, popLayout) with interactive toggle buttons for developers learning motion/react patterns
Shows how different animation modes affect element exit/enter transitions in React applications
Provides visual reference implementation for animation systems in SaaS dashboards
Educational component for understanding Framer Motion animation lifecycle
Interactive demo for showcasing animation behavior in documentation or component galleries
ai_summary: A demonstration component showcasing three AnimatePresence modes (sync, wait, popLayout) from Framer Motion/react. Features animated icons that toggle states via a button, with each mode producing different transition behaviors. Clean minimalist design with inline styles and motion/react animations. Ideal for developer documentation, animation tutorials, or as a reference implementation for interactive animation systems in web applications.
